title: Device Request - Tuya Zigbee Soil Moisture Sensor - _TZE200_wqashyqo / TS0601

diagComments.excerpt:
### Update: Extended Device Interview Available

After pairing the device successfully, an extended interview shows that the device does have standard Zigbee clusters:

**Working standard clusters:**
- Temperature measurement (1026): Shows 2270 = 22.7Â°C 
- Battery status (1): Shows 30 = 3.0V and 200 = 100% 
- Relative humidity (1029): Present but shows 0% 

**Analysis:**
The presence of standard Zigbee clusters suggests this device is a hybrid implementation. Temperature and battery work via standard clusters, but soil moisture data is likely transmitted via the Tuya proprietary cluster (0xEF00) which would explain why humidity shows 0%.

This information might help determine the best implementation approach for driver development.
